name: mpesavento--memory-sync
description: Scrape and analyze OpenClaw JSONL session logs to reconstruct and backfill agent memory files. Use when: (1) Memory appears incomplete after model switches, (2) Verifying memory coverage, (3) Reconstructing lost memory, (4) Automated daily memory sync via cron/heartbeat. Supports simple extraction and LLM-based narrative summaries with automatic secret sanitization.
